title: diasperus rigens
intro_study: According to "Phytochemistry", diasperus rigens benefits from the genus Dillenia include having reported antidiabetes and antioxidant activities.
side_effects: Diasperus rigens can have side effects if used improperly, such as severe allergic reactions, liver damage, and cardiovascular instability. Overexposure to its toxic compounds can lead to symptoms like headaches, dizziness, and nausea, which may be exacerbated by individual sensitivities. Misuse of diasperus rigens can also result in respiratory issues, such as coughing, wheezing, and shortness of breath, particularly in individuals with pre-existing respiratory conditions. Furthermore, long-term exposure to its toxic properties may lead to irreversible damage to the kidneys and liver.
